answers.question: Which SIEM and ticketing integrations are supported out of the box?
answers.answer: Helios provides native, out-of-the-box integrations with the following SIEM platforms: Splunk, Microsoft Sentinel, and Elastic [DOC-TD-05]. For ticketing and collaboration, we support ServiceNow, Jira, PagerDuty, and Slack natively [DOC-TD-05]. Additionally, Helios offers an open REST API and webhook capability for custom integrations, enabling connectivity with any platform not covered by our native integrations [DOC-TD-05].

answers.question: Confirm SOC 2 Type II status and date of most recent report.
answers.answer: Helios maintains SOC 2 Type II certification, with our most recent audit report dated February 14, 2026, conducted by Schellman [DOC-CP-01]. This independent audit covers our security, availability, and confidentiality controls across all Helios services. We are happy to provide the full report under NDA during the evaluation process.

answers.question: How many financial services customers do you serve, and can Meridian be used as a reference?
answers.answer: Helios serves 87 financial services customers as of Q1 2026, as part of our broader customer base of over 640 organizations [DOC-CI-01]. Yes, Meridian Credit Union is listed as a referenceable account with permission, alongside other financial services customers such as RidgePoint Capital and Atlas Insurance Group [DOC-CI-01]. We would be delighted to facilitate a reference call with your existing Helios contacts at Meridian.
